title: Global Market Today: Asian stocks drop after chip selloff, oil gains
description: Asian stocks declined as chipmakers pulled down Wall Street amid valuation concerns. Oil prices climbed higher this week due to escalating Middle East hostilities. Investors are questioning the sustainability of massive artificial intelligence investments and tech valuations. Heightened geopolitical tensions fueled inflation worries and potential interest rate hikes. Consumers continue spending and the labor market shows resilience despite economic challenges.

title: Securing the foundations of AI
description: Artificial intelligence is exposing a weakness that has little to do with the technology itself.

title: C-DAC anchors India’s bid for Nvidia-like artificial intelligence chip
description: India’s first, indigenous AI inference chip will be made and presented as early as 2029 or 2030, Union IT minister Ashwini Vaishnaw said on Wednesday after the Cabinet approved a ₹1.27 trillion Semicon 2.0 mission to incentivize chip factories, startups, design firms and research.
content: “Following this, C-DAC will work jointly with HCL to validate the performance of the chip, and the same will then be tested across multiple systems and computing architecture. Our eventual goal is to offer the chip to run on domestic servers and IT i... [3060 chars]

title: MLB cracks down on dugout iPads with artificial intelligence fears growing
description: With AI fears growing, MLB is cracking down on the use of league-provided dugout iPads.
content:
MLB is cracking down on artificial intelligence.

title: New California law requires human teachers, not AI
description: California's new law ensures K-12 students are taught by human teachers, not artificial intelligence.
content:
California is drawing a line in the digital sand.
Starting 2027, public schools in the Golden State can’t have AI teachers for K-12 students.
The latest amendment to the state’s education code, signed by Gov. Gavin Newsom last month, clarifies that a... [1153 chars]

title: Appeals Court Warns Bankruptcy Lawyer Over Alleged AI Citations
description: A federal appeals court admonished, but declined to sanction, an attorney for a brief containing what one judge called “an astonishing number” of citations that were incorrect or possibly hallucinated by artificial intelligence.
content:

content:

title: US judge warns Justice Department about AI use in immigration case
description: A federal judge in Michigan on Thursday cautioned the U.S. ​Justice Department about the risks associated with generative artificial intelligence after finding that a government filing ‌cited a case that the court could not locate.

title: AI humanoid robotics company sets up shop in Fremont
description: A robotics company has set up shop in Fremont, bringing dozens of jobs and robot-related artificial intelligence technologies and to the East Bay.
content:
